body: Causes: 1) Rect-to-Region Mapping May Not Be Unique; If the same rect is added as both a weather rect and a snow rect (or appears in multiple zones), it may be registered twice in RegionRect, resulting in multiple region indices for the same rect.

title: Latest things 17.1->
body: Causes: 2)  Prevent Duplicate Region Registration; In RegisterRegionRectInternal, you already check if a rect is registered (FindRegionIndex(r) != -1). But if the same rect is used for both weather and snow

title: Latest things 17.1->
body: Causes: 3) StopZoneWeatherInternal and SetZoneWeatherInternal use FindRegionIndex(r) to get a single region index. If a rect is registered more than once, only the first is stopped/started.

body: Causes: 4) Ensure each rect is only registered once in RegionRect.
